# Fixture for DerivedAge.txt — Unicode version when each codepoint was introduced.
# Format: XXXX[..YYYY]; M.N
0020..007E; 1.1
00A0..00FF; 1.1
0100..017F; 1.1
0180..024F; 1.1
0250..02AF; 1.1
0370..03FF; 1.1
0400..04FF; 1.1
0530..058F; 1.1
1E00..1EFF; 1.1
1F00..1FFF; 1.1
2000..206F; 1.1
2070..209F; 1.1
20A0..20CF; 1.1

2100..214F; 1.1
3400..4DBF; 3.0
4E00..9FFF; 1.1
A000..A48F; 3.0
10000..1007F; 4.0
1F300..1F5FF; 6.0
